title: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Postmenopausal Women with Cystitis
description: Equisetum arvense tinctures may help with cystitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The tincture contains compounds like saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which can help reduce inflammation, kill bacteria, and soothe the bladder and urinary tract. Equisetum arvense has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections, and its constituents may help combat bacterial growth and ease pain associated with cystitis.
